basics.description: Launch day-2 operations for an existing Azure Virtual Desktop deployment by targeting an existing host pool and running a scoped operational workflow.

basics.name: deploymentPrefix
basics.label: Deployment Prefix
basics.toolTip: Naming prefix used for resources other than the host pool.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 1-6 lowercase letters or digits.

options.text: This wizard is dedicated to day-2 operations for an existing Azure Virtual Desktop deployment. The action scope is fixed, so no scenario selection is required.

Existing deployment expansion now supports adding session hosts to an existing host pool. Select the target host pool, review the detected host pool posture, then provide VM, image, subnet, and authentication settings for the new hosts only.

Day-2 operations now includes pooled host pool scaling plan management. Select an existing host pool, define the schedule, and the deployment will only create or update the scaling plan attachment without recreating session hosts.

elements.name: selectedHostPool
elements.label: Existing host pool
elements.toolTip: Select the existing host pool that will be inspected and targeted by the brownfield action.

options.text: [concat('Detected host pool type: ', steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.hostPoolType, '. Load balancer: ', steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.loadBalancerType, '. Preferred app group: ', steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.preferredAppGroupType, '. Auth posture: ', if(contains(string(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.customRdpProperty), 'targetisaadjoined:i:1'), 'EntraID', 'HybridJoin'), '.')]

[concat('Related app groups discovered in scope: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Related workspaces discovered in scope: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]

[concat('Host pool diagnostic settings discovered: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]
[concat('Scaling plans discovered in scope: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').scalingPlansApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').scalingPlansApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]

allowedValues.label: Remediate VM/image baseline with replacement hosts

options.text: Expand Existing Deployment now supports adding session hosts, aligning monitoring posture, or staging replacement session hosts with a new VM/image baseline without recreating the rest of the environment.
Day-2 operations now includes scaling plan management, monitoring alignment, access assignment updates, FSLogix private connectivity reconciliation, and a no-change operational summary path.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 3-64 letters, numbers, spaces, periods, underscores, or hyphens.

elements.name: scalingPlanDescription
elements.label: Description
elements.defaultValue: Brownfield day-2 scaling plan managed by the AVD deployment wizard.

elements.name: scalingPlanTimeZone
elements.label: Time zone
elements.toolTip: Use a Windows time zone identifier such as UTC, GMT Standard Time, or Pacific Standard Time.

elements.name: scalingPlanExclusionTag
elements.label: Exclusion tag (optional)
elements.toolTip: Any session host carrying this tag is excluded from scaling actions.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 24-hour HH:mm format.
Use 24-hour HH:mm format.
Use 24-hour HH:mm format.
Use 24-hour HH:mm format.
Use 24-hour HH:mm format.
Use 24-hour HH:mm format.
Use 24-hour HH:mm format.
Use 24-hour HH:mm format.

elements.name: rampDownNotificationMessage
elements.label: Ramp-down notification message
elements.defaultValue: This session host will be stopped by the Azure Virtual Desktop scaling plan.

options.text: Scaling plan management is currently supported only for pooled host pools. Select a pooled host pool to continue with the day-2 scaling plan action.

[concat('Application groups discovered in scope for assignment review: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Detailed assignment changes are configured below.')]

constraints.validationMessage: Must be a valid GUID.
Must be a valid GUID.

allowedValues.label: Control-plane only: diagnostic settings for the host pool, related workspaces, and related app groups
Full monitoring posture: control-plane diagnostics plus guest AMA and DCR onboarding for discovered session hosts
Create new workspace in the target host pool resource group
Use an existing Log Analytics workspace

constraints.validationMessage: Use 4-63 letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

options.text: [concat('Discovered session hosts in the selected host pool: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Guest monitoring onboarding will target the corresponding VM names derived from those AVD session hosts.')]

allowedValues.label: Standard: essential CPU, queue, memory, disk, and AVD/FSLogix/profile errors and warnings
Enhanced: Standard plus paging, extra disk and network detail, and informational AVD/FSLogix/profile events

options.text: [if(equals(steps('monitoringSettings').monitoringPreset, 'Enhanced'), 'Enhanced preset collects the Standard baseline plus memory paging, extra disk latency and queue detail, network queue and packet errors, and informational Terminal Services, RdpCoreTS, FSLogix, and User Profile Service events.', 'Standard preset collects essential CPU, processor queue, available and committed memory, core disk latency and throughput, network throughput, and critical, error, and warning events from Terminal Services, RdpCoreTS, FSLogix, and User Profile Service channels.')]

elements.name: sessionHostVmResourceGroupName
elements.label: Session host VM resource group name
elements.toolTip: Use the resource group that contains the existing session host virtual machines. This defaults to the selected host pool resource group because that is the most common layout.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter the resource group name that contains the existing session host virtual machines.

options.text: [if(equals(steps('monitoringSettings').monitoringScope, 'FullMonitoringPosture'), concat('This action aligns control-plane diagnostic settings and also onboards the discovered session host virtual machines to Azure Monitor Agent and a Data Collection Rule using the ', steps('monitoringSettings').monitoringPreset, ' guest telemetry preset. Session hosts are not recreated.'), 'This action aligns control-plane diagnostic settings on the selected host pool, discovered workspaces, and discovered application groups. It does not redeploy session hosts or guest-level Azure Monitor Agent associations.')]

Optional but recommended for the summary report: select the FSLogix storage account, the session-host VNet, and optionally the private DNS zone to assess storage exposure and private connectivity posture.

allowedValues.label: Create and link private DNS zone

options.text: [concat('Public network access: ', if(contains(steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageApi, 'properties'), steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageApi.properties.publicNetworkAccess, 'Unknown'), '. Private endpoint connections detected: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixPrivateEndpointConnectionsApi, 'value'), steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixPrivateEndpointConnectionsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]

[concat('Action summary: scenario ', steps('deploymentScenario').deploymentScenario, '; selected host pool ', if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool, 'name'), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.name, 'Unknown'), '; day-2 operation ', if(equals(steps('deploymentScenario').deploymentScenario, 'Day2Operations'), steps('day2Operation').day2Operation, 'NotApplicable'), '.')]

[concat('Target host pool resource group: ', if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool, 'id'), last(take(split(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.id, '/'), 5)), 'Unknown'), '. Detected host pool type: ', if(and(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi, 'properties'), contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties, 'hostPoolType')), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.hostPoolType, 'Unknown'), '. Application groups discovered in scope: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Workspaces discovered in scope: ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]

[concat('Executive summary preview: selected host pool ', if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool, 'name'), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.name, 'Unknown'), '; host pool diagnostics settings discovered ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; scaling plans discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').scalingPlansApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').scalingPlansApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; session hosts discovered ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. This action is read-only and emits a structured best-practice report.')]

[concat('Target summary: location ', if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool, 'location'), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.location, 'Unknown'), '; host pool type ', if(and(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi, 'properties'), contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties, 'hostPoolType')), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.hostPoolType, 'Unknown'), '; load balancer ', if(and(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi, 'properties'), contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties, 'loadBalancerType')), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.loadBalancerType, 'Unknown'), '; preferred app group ', if(and(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi, 'properties'), contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties, 'preferredAppGroupType')), steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPoolApi.properties.preferredAppGroupType, 'Unknown'), '.')]

[concat('Related resources preview: application groups discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; workspaces discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; session hosts discovered ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').sessionHostsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '.')]

[concat('Gap register preview: host pool diagnostics settings discovered ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; scaling plans discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').scalingPlansApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').scalingPlansApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; related resources and best-practice gaps will be returned in the deployment outputs.')]

[concat('Monitoring coverage preview: host pool diagnostic settings discovered ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').hostPoolDiagnosticsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; workspaces discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; application groups discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Detailed diagnostics coverage is returned in the deployment outputs.')]

[concat('Access posture preview: resource-group role assignments discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').resourceGroupRoleAssignmentsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').resourceGroupRoleAssignmentsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '; related application groups discovered in scope ', string(length(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Detailed assignment posture is returned in the deployment outputs.')]

[if(contains(steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageAccount, 'id'), concat('FSLogix posture preview: storage account ', steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageAccount.name, '; public network access ', if(contains(steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageApi, 'properties'), steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixStorageApi.properties.publicNetworkAccess, 'Unknown'), '; private endpoint connections discovered ', string(length(if(contains(steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixPrivateEndpointConnectionsApi, 'value'), steps('fslogixSettings').fslogixPrivateEndpointConnectionsApi.value, parse('[]')))), '. Detailed FSLogix and private DNS posture is returned in the deployment outputs.'), 'FSLogix posture preview: not assessed because no storage account was provided for the summary workflow.')]

[concat('Recommended follow-up: review the deployment outputs for the formal gap register and recommendation set. If host pool diagnostics are missing, consider AlignMonitoringPosture. If the host pool is pooled and no scaling plan is attached, consider ConfigureScalingPlan.')]

Assessment coverage: this report now assesses host pool properties, related application groups and workspaces, host pool diagnostic settings, derived workspace and application-group diagnostics coverage in the host pool resource group, scaling plan attachments, registered session hosts, derived application-group role assignments in the host pool resource group, and FSLogix private-connectivity posture when a storage account is provided. It still does not assess guest AMA or DCR coverage, NSG rules, routes, firewalls, or guest OS drift.

constraints.validationMessage: Use 3-64 letters, numbers, or hyphens.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: VM Size
elements.toolTip: Select the Azure VM size for AVD session hosts. Recommended sizes are pre-filtered for AVD workloads.

elements.name: avdCompatibleMarketplaceOs
elements.label: Compatible OS
elements.toolTip: Curated Azure Virtual Desktop-supported operating systems based on Microsoft Learn prerequisites.

elements.name: galleryPicker
elements.label: Azure Compute Gallery
elements.toolTip: Select an existing Azure Compute Gallery. Use the subscription selector in the picker to browse across subscriptions. The default view shows galleries in the subscription selected on the Basics tab.

elements.name: galleryImageDefinitionName
elements.label: Image definition
elements.toolTip: Select the gallery image definition to use for session host VMs.

elements.name: galleryImageVersion
elements.label: Gallery image version
elements.toolTip: Select the image version to deploy. Versions are listed from the selected image definition.

elements.name: sessionHostSecurityType
elements.label: Session host security type
elements.toolTip: Auto uses Trusted Launch for Azure Compute Gallery images and Standard for Marketplace images. Choose Trusted Launch explicitly if your gallery image requires it.

elements.name: hostPoolTypePooled
elements.label: Host Pool Type
elements.toolTip: This value follows the selected AVD Mode automatically.

elements.name: hostPoolTypePersonal
elements.label: Host Pool Type
elements.toolTip: This value follows the selected AVD Mode automatically.

elements.name: networkMode
elements.label: Network deployment mode
elements.toolTip: Create new network provisions a dedicated spoke VNet. Use existing network deploys AVD into a VNet and subnets you already manage.

allowedValues.label: Create new network — new spoke VNet and subnets
Use existing network — existing VNet and subnets

elements.name: newVnetName
elements.label: Spoke VNet name
elements.toolTip: Name for the new spoke virtual network to be created for AVD session hosts.

constraints.validationMessage: 2-64 characters. Letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens and periods only.

elements.name: newVnetAddressPrefix
elements.label: Spoke VNet address space
elements.toolTip: CIDR block for the new spoke VNet (e.g. 10.20.0.0/16). Must not overlap with your hub or on-premises networks.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid private CIDR such as 10.20.0.0/16.

elements.name: newSessionHostSubnetName
elements.label: Session host subnet name
elements.toolTip: Name for the subnet where AVD session host VMs will be deployed.

constraints.validationMessage: 2-80 characters. Letters, numbers and hyphens only.

elements.name: newSessionHostSubnetPrefix
elements.label: Session host subnet prefix
elements.toolTip: CIDR block for the session host subnet. Must be within the spoke VNet address space (e.g. 10.20.1.0/24).

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid CIDR such as 10.20.1.0/24.

elements.name: newPrivateEndpointSubnetName
elements.label: Private endpoint subnet name
elements.toolTip: Name for the subnet that will host private endpoints (FSLogix storage, monitoring).

constraints.validationMessage: 2-80 characters. Letters, numbers and hyphens only.

elements.name: newPrivateEndpointSubnetPrefix
elements.label: Private endpoint subnet prefix
elements.toolTip: CIDR block for the private endpoint subnet. /27 (32 addresses) is sufficient (e.g. 10.20.2.0/27).

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid CIDR such as 10.20.2.0/27.

elements.name: hubVnet
elements.label: Hub virtual network (optional — for VNet peering)
elements.toolTip: Select an existing hub VNet to peer the new spoke VNet with. Leave unselected to skip peering.

elements.name: existingVnet
elements.label: Existing virtual network
elements.toolTip: Select the VNet where AVD session hosts will be deployed.

elements.name: sessionHostSubnetName
elements.label: Session host subnet
elements.toolTip: Select the subnet where AVD session host VMs will be deployed.

constraints.allowedValues: [map(if(contains(steps('networking').subnetsApi, 'value'), steps('networking').subnetsApi.value, take(split('x', ','), 0)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item.name, ' (', coalesce(item.properties.addressPrefix, ''), ')","value":"', item.name, '"}')))]

elements.name: privateEndpointSubnetName
elements.label: Private endpoint subnet
elements.toolTip: Select the subnet for AVD private endpoints (FSLogix storage, monitoring).

constraints.allowedValues: [map(if(contains(steps('networking').subnetsApi, 'value'), steps('networking').subnetsApi.value, take(split('x', ','), 0)), (item) => parse(concat('{"label":"', item.name, ' (', coalesce(item.properties.addressPrefix, ''), ')","value":"', item.name, '"}')))]

constraints.validationMessage: Use 3-24 lowercase letters or digits.

elements.name: deployFSLogixPrivateEndpoint
elements.label: Deploy private endpoint for FSLogix storage (recommended for production)
elements.toolTip: Deploys a private endpoint in the private endpoint subnet and disables public storage access. Requires a private endpoint subnet — created automatically in Greenfield mode. Isolated Brownfield deployments must provide a private endpoint subnet.

elements.name: deployMonitoring
elements.label: Deploy Log Analytics workspace and enable Monitoring
elements.toolTip: Creates a Log Analytics workspace, enables Azure Virtual Desktop diagnostic settings, deploys Azure Monitor Agent guest telemetry for session hosts, and sends FSLogix storage diagnostics to the workspace.

constraints.validationMessage: Use at least 12 characters including upper, lower, number, and symbol.
Must be a valid GUID.
Must be a valid GUID.

elements.name: remoteApps
elements.label: RemoteApp definitions
elements.toolTip: Add one row per RemoteApp. Name and executable path are required.

constraints.validationMessage: App name must be 1-64 characters and must not contain \ / : * ? " < > |
Must be a full Windows path ending in .exe
Use a valid domain FQDN such as cloudaigeek.com.
Use DOMAIN\username or username@domain. Plain username is allowed and will be normalized automatically.

label.confirmPassword: Confirm domain join service account password

elements.name: domainJoinOuPath
elements.label: Optional OU path
elements.toolTip: Example: OU=AVD,DC=contoso,DC=com

constraints.validationMessage: Use distinguished name format such as OU=AVD,DC=contoso,DC=com (or leave blank).

elements.name: entraUserObjectIds
elements.label: Legacy shared Entra object IDs
elements.toolTip: Compatibility path. Optional shared User object IDs applied to all published app groups when EntraID authentication is selected.

constraints.validationMessage: Use one or more GUID object IDs separated by commas or new lines.

elements.name: hybridUserObjectIds
elements.label: Legacy shared hybrid user object IDs
elements.toolTip: Compatibility path. Optional shared User object IDs applied to all published app groups when HybridJoin is selected.

constraints.validationMessage: Use one or more GUID object IDs separated by commas or new lines.

outputs.brownfieldDetectedWorkspacesWithDiagnost: [if(not(equals(steps('deploymentScenario').deploymentScenario, 'NewDeployment')), map(filter(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').workspacesApi.value, parse('[]')), (workspace) => greater(length(filter(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').resourceGroupResourcesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').resourceGroupResourcesApi.value, parse('[]')), (resource) => contains(resource.id, concat(workspace.id, '/providers/Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings/')))), 0)), (workspace) => workspace.name), parse('[]'))]
outputs.brownfieldDetectedApplicationGroupsWithD: [if(not(equals(steps('deploymentScenario').deploymentScenario, 'NewDeployment')), map(filter(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').appGroupsApi.value, parse('[]')), (appGroup) => and(equals(appGroup.properties.hostPoolArmPath, steps('brownfieldTarget').selectedHostPool.id), greater(length(filter(if(contains(steps('brownfieldTarget').resourceGroupResourcesApi, 'value'), steps('brownfieldTarget').resourceGroupResourcesApi.value, parse('[]')), (resource) => contains(resource.id, concat(appGroup.id, '/providers/Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings/')))), 0))), (appGroup) => appGroup.name), parse('[]'))]
outputs.rampDownNotificationMessage: [if(equals(steps('deploymentScenario').deploymentScenario, 'Day2Operations'), steps('scalingPlanSettings').rampDownNotificationMessage, 'This session host will be stopped by the Azure Virtual Desktop scaling plan.')]
